messages.body:
CONTEXT FROM YOUR BOSS:

## Current State
G1-G4 are DONE. All 3 PR branches exist and PRs are open:
- PR1 (HMR fix): https://github.com/paperclipai/paperclip/pull/1001 — branch: fix/hmr-websocket-reverse-proxy
- PR2 (Test infra): https://github.com/paperclipai/paperclip/pull/1002 — branch: test/server-coverage-harness  
- PR3 (Multiuser): https://github.com/paperclipai/paperclip/pull/1112 — branch: feat/multiuser-support

## YOUR MISSION: Execute G5 and G6
You need to:

### G5: QA All PR Branches
1. Check out each branch, run pnpm install, typecheck, tests, build
2. Fix any failures
3. Use agent-browser to take screenshots of the running app on our dev server at https://felipe.genie.namastex.io for PR3:
   - Login page, user menu, account settings, company settings with members, invite flow, @mention autocomplete, inbox mentions, avatars, company logo
4. Save screenshots to .genie/wishes/upstream-pr-strategy/screenshots/

### G6: Write Rich PR Descriptions
1. Update ALL 3 PRs with rich descriptions using gh pr edit
2. Each PR must explain "This is PR X/3 in our multiuser contribution series" and link the others
3. PR3 needs FULL Path 2 treatment: summary, backend section, frontend section, migrations section, screenshots, testing evidence, review guide
4. Each PR explains WHY 3 PRs: reviewability, independence, test-infra-first strategy

## IMPORTANT
- The PR branches are on origin (namastexlabs/paperclip), PRs target upstream (paperclipai/paperclip)
- Use `gh pr edit <number> --repo paperclipai/paperclip --body "..."` to update descriptions
- The owner wants to wake up with everything polished. Make it excellent.
- Do NOT merge anything. Only create/update PRs.
